query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "XBASE Technologies". The company's official website domain is xbase.com — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
XBASE Technologies is a Toronto-based Managed IT Service Provider (MSP) that has been operating since 1988. The company demonstrates a strong market position, evidenced by long-term enterprise client retention and a #123 ranking on the 2025 MSP 501 List. However, a stark contrast exists between its external market reputation and internal employee sentiment, with client testimonials praising exceptional service delivery while employee reviews highlight significant concerns regarding compensation, understaffing, and workplace culture.

**Company Overview & Operations**
XBASE Technologies Corp. is headquartered at 60 Prince Andrew Place, Unit B, Toronto, Ontario M3C 2H4, Canada, and maintains a secondary location or service focus in Vaughan, Ontario [Business IT Support Services in Toronto | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/) [XBASE Technologies Support Centre | Security Network Monitoring in Toronto](https://www.xbase.com/support-centre/). 

The firm employs a team of 20+ certified IT engineers who specialize in networking, virtualization, and security [Business IT Support Services in Toronto | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/). Identified advisory and support team members include Kate B., Vlad G., Gary S., and Christopher D. [Business IT Support Services in Toronto | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/). 

XBASE's core service portfolio includes:
*   **Managed IT Services:** Features 24/7 monitoring and unlimited live-answered support [Managed IT Services Toronto | IT Solutions | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/services/managed-services/).
*   **Infrastructure & Cloud:** Supported by three company-operated data centers providing redundancy, alongside Managed Cloud Services and Disaster Recovery [Business IT Support Services in Toronto | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/).
*   **Specialized Services:** Cybersecurity, VoIP Services, IT consulting, future technology planning, and Microsoft 365 support/migration [Business IT Support Services in Toronto | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/).

The company holds several high-level vendor partnerships, operating as a Microsoft Gold Certified Partner, a VMware Enterprise Partner, and a Cisco Partner [Business IT Support Services in Toronto | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/). Internally, XBASE utilizes technologies such as WordPress.org, PHP, reCAPTCHA, and Google AdSense for its own web properties [XBASE Technologies - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/xbase-technologies-corp/56655970).

**Industry Classification Codes**
Corporate registries and business directories classify XBASE Technologies under the following industry codes:
*   **NAICS:** 54 and 541 (Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services); 5415, 54151, and 541512 (Computer Systems Design and Related Services); 51 (Information); and 518 (Data Processing, Hosting, and Related Services) [XBASE Technologies - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/xbase-technologies-corp/56655970) [XBASE Technologies Corp. Information](https://rocketreach.co/xbase-technologies-corp-profile_b5c7657df42e0d6d).
*   **SIC:** 73 (Business Services) and 737 (Computer Programming, Data Processing, And Other Computer Related Services) [XBASE Technologies - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/xbase-technologies-corp/56655970).
*   **IPqwery Class:** Scientific and technological services [XBASE Technologies - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/xbase-technologies).

**Client Portfolio & Market Sentiment**
Market sentiment toward XBASE Technologies is highly positive. The company was ranked #123 on the 2025 MSP 501 List [XBASE Technologies - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/xbase-technologies-corp/56655970). Scam Detector assigns xbase.com a trust score of 70.4 out of 100, categorizing the domain as "Standard. Valid. Common." [xbase.com Reviews: Is this site a scam or legit? – Scam Detector](https://www.scam-detector.com/validator/xbase-com-review/).

The company serves diverse verticals including Financial Services, Not-for-Profit, Manufacturing, Insurance, Healthcare, Business Services, and Real Estate [XBASE Technologies Corp. | LinkedIn](https://ca.linkedin.com/company/xbase). Client testimonials indicate strong retention and high satisfaction:
*   **YMCA Canada & JVS Toronto:** Both have utilized XBASE's managed services for approximately 10 years, with JVS Toronto awarding them consecutive contracts following RFP processes [XBASE Technologies](https://www.xbase.com/) [Top Rated Toronto Cybersecurity Services | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/services/cyber-security/).
*   **Skyway Canada:** IT Manager Jay Sisican notes XBASE is a "Tier 1 service provider" whose services have more than tripled over an 8-year relationship [Top Rated Toronto Cybersecurity Services | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/services/cyber-security/).
*   **Picton Mahoney Asset Management:** Director of IT Rob Veling reported that XBASE had not missed a single SLA in his 5 years with the firm [Top Rated Toronto Cybersecurity Services | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/services/cyber-security/).
*   **Operational Praise:** Clients highlight XBASE's proactive monitoring (calling within minutes of a power drop at Stanpac Inc.), seamless onboarding (Orange Insurance), and transparent per-user costing models [Top Rated Toronto Cybersecurity Services | XBASE](https://www.xbase.com/services/cyber-security/) [XBASE Client Reviews](https://www.cloudtango.net/providers/6323/xbase).

Despite this strong client feedback, XBASE has virtually no presence on standard B2B review platforms. As of the latest data, Clutch and Goodfirms show zero submitted reviews, and their Facebook page is listed as "Not yet rated" despite having 2 reviews [XBASE Technologies - Services & Company Info](https://clutch.co/profile/xbase-technologies) [XBASE Technologies Reviews & Ratings | Goodfirms](https://www.goodfirms.co/company/xbase-technologies) [XBASE Technologies | Toronto ON | Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/xbasetechnologies/). Furthermore, the company's official Twitter account (@XbaseTech) has not posted any content since joining in March 2013 [XBASE Technologies (@XbaseTech) / Posts / X](https://x.com/xbasetech).

**Employee Sentiment & Compensation**
Internal sentiment is notably strained, characterized by complaints regarding workload, compensation, and management practices. 

*   **Ratings:** On Indeed, the company holds a 3.4 out of 5 overall rating across 9 reviews, with sub-ratings of 3.7 for work-life balance and 3.2 for pay and benefits [Working at XBASE Technologies: Employee Reviews | Indeed.com](https://ca.indeed.com/cmp/Xbase-Technologies/reviews). On Glassdoor, 10 employee reviews resulted in a low 2.1 out of 5 rating specifically for compensation and benefits [How Much Does XBASE Technologies Pay in 2026? (19 Salaries) | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.ca/Salary/XBASE-Technologies-Salaries-E788241.htm).
*   **Workplace Culture:** Anonymous Glassdoor and Indeed reviews describe the environment as "super stressful" with a "revolving door of new hires." Employees claim the company takes on too much work with insufficient staff, frequently assigning "2 person projects" to single individuals [XBASE Technologies Reviews: What Is It Like to Work At XBASE Technologies? | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.ca/Reviews/XBASE-Technologies-Reviews-E788241.htm) [Working at XBASE Technologies in Toronto, ON: Employee Reviews | Indeed.com](https://ca.indeed.com/cmp/Xbase-Technologies/reviews?fcountry=CA&floc=Toronto,+ON). Management has also been accused of "public shaming" and playing "mind games" [XBASE Technologies Reviews: What Is It Like to Work At XBASE Technologies? | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.ca/Reviews/XBASE-Technologies-Reviews-E788241.htm). 
*   **Compensation Data:** Salary data indicates below-market compensation for certain roles. An Electrical Project Manager averages $35,636 annually (138% lower than the Canadian average), and a Service Coordinator (Dispatcher) role was listed at a fixed $37,000 per year [XBASE Technologies Electrical Project Manager Salaries | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.ca/Salary/XBASE-Technologies-Electrical-Project-Manager-Salaries-E788241_D_KO19,45.htm) [XBASE Technologies hiring Service Coordinator (Dispatcher) IT Helpdesk MSP Job in Toronto | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.ca/job-listing/service-coordinator-dispatcher-it-helpdesk-msp-xbase-technologies-JV_IC2281069_KO0,46_KE47,65.htm?jl=1009778161081). The highest-paying identified role is Software Engineer at an estimated $112,556 [XBASE Technologies Salaries in Toronto | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.ca/Salary/XBASE-Technologies-Toronto-Salaries-EI_IE788241.0,18_IL.19,26_IM976.htm). Reviewers also allege the company does not provide severance upon termination [Working at XBASE Technologies in Toronto, ON: Employee Reviews | Indeed.com](https://ca.indeed.com/cmp/Xbase-Technologies/reviews?fcountry=CA&floc=Toronto,+ON).
*   **Positive Aspects:** Despite the criticisms, some employees recommend XBASE Technologies for students and new graduates as a valuable stepping stone to learn industry-standard IT tools [Working at XBASE Technologies in Toronto, ON: Employee Reviews | Indeed.com](https://ca.indeed.com/cmp/Xbase-Technologies/reviews?fcountry=CA&floc=Toronto,+ON).

**Gaps and Limitations**
Based on the provided research findings, the following requested information could not be sourced:
*   **UNSPSC and ISIC Codes:** No data was available regarding the company's United Nations Standard Products and Services Code (UNSPSC) or International Standard Industrial Classification (ISIC).
*   **Reddit and G2 Discussions:** No findings were provided containing market sentiment, reviews, or community discussions specifically from Reddit or G2.
